title: Brownfield CSV/JSON import parser + import and confirm commands
definition_of_done: ParseCSV and ParseJSON parse to ImportedIssue with imported provenance; import command emits create+source-link ops; confirm command emits dag-transition op; --format=json output; TestParseCSV/TestParseJSON/TestImportedItemsHaveCorrectProvenance pass
outcome: ParseCSV/ParseJSON with imported provenance; import/confirm commands registered; TestParseCSV/TestParseJSON/TestImportedItemsHaveCorrectProvenance pass

notes.msg: Implemented importbf package with ParseCSV/ParseJSON returning ImportedIssue with imported provenance; added import command (CSV/JSON, --source, --dry-run, --format=json); added confirm command emitting dag-transition op; all 3 tests pass, build clean
